executives.name: Eddy Hartenstein
executives.background: Mr. Hartenstein has served as a director since 2016. He was previously the CEO of the Los Angeles Times and Chairman and CEO of DIRECTV, Inc. He serves on the boards of Sirius XM Holdings and TiVo Corporation.

executives.name: John Thornton
executives.background: Executive Chairman, Barrick Gold Corporation; Former President, Goldman Sachs.
